idea-plugin.name: Midjourney MCP
idea-plugin.description:
AI Image Generation with Midjourney via Model Context Protocol (MCP).

This plugin helps you set up the MCP Midjourney server with JetBrains AI Assistant. Once configured, AI Assistant can create, edit, blend and transform images — all powered by Ace Data Cloud.

Features

  • 15 AI Tools — Create, edit, blend and transform images
  • Easy Setup — One-click copy MCP configuration for AI Assistant
  • Dual Mode — STDIO (local) and HTTP (remote) server support
  • Token Management — Store API token securely in IDE settings

Available Tools

  • Imagine — Generate images from text prompts
  • Variations — Create variations of existing images
  • Upscale — Enhance image resolution
  • Blend — Blend multiple images together
  • Describe — Get text descriptions of images
  • Edits — Transform and edit images

Quick Start

  1. Install this plugin
  2. Open Settings → Tools → Midjourney MCP
  3. Enter your Ace Data Cloud API token
  4. Click Copy Config and paste into Settings → Tools → AI Assistant → MCP

Requires uv (Python package runner) for STDIO mode, or use HTTP mode for zero-install remote access.

action.description: Copy STDIO MCP configuration for AI Assistant
Copy HTTP MCP configuration for AI Assistant
